lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show signs of age. There are visible scratches and minor dents on the exterior. The interior shows moderate wear and tear.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would serve well as a dependable daily driver or a first car. The exterior shows its age with several noticeable scratches, minor dents on the passenger side doors, and some significant paint fading on the roof and trunk. Inside, the cabin is clean but displays moderate wear on the seat bolsters and some fading on the dashboard plastics. Mechanically, the car is solid and has been regularly serviced, though it does have higher mileage and a minor oil leak that does not affect daily operation. It is a functional, honest vehicle that prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, having been meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior is flawless, with a deep, showroom-quality finish and no visible imperfections, stone chips, or scratches. The interior is equally pristine, showing no signs of wear on the upholstery or trim, and all electronic features function perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in peak condition with a full, documented service history and drives exactly as it did when new. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle in truly exceptional, untouched condition.

This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and the interior shows heavy wear. It requires major mechanical repairs and is not currently in reliable running condition.
Mint condition.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle exhibits a commendable standard of upkeep and mechanical consistency. Its refined exterior profile is matched by a well-appointed interior, reflecting a history of diligent ownership and disciplined maintenance. Engineered for sustained performance and reliability, this offering represents a sophisticated acquisition for the professional motorist who demands quality without compromise.

Hey there! Thanks for stopping by! I’m selling my trusty car that’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really wonderful shape and has been super well-maintained over the years—honestly, it still looks and feels fantastic on the road! Perfect for daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. I’m sad to see it go, but I know it’ll make the next owner very happy. Let me know if you want to take it for a spin!

Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity to own a well-maintained, reliable driver that strikes the perfect balance between luxury and utility. The exterior maintains a strong curb appeal with a deep, lustrous paint finish, showing only the minor stone chips and light surface marks one would expect from careful, regular use. Inside, the cabin is a highlight—smoke-free, crisp, and exceptionally clean. The premium upholstery shows minimal wear on the bolsters, and every button, switch, and digital display functions exactly as it should. Mechanically, the car is in great shape; it has been treated to timely synthetic oil changes, and the transmission shifts smoothly through every gear. Recent maintenance includes a fresh set of tires and a brake service, meaning it is turn-key ready for its next owner. While not a showroom trailer-queen, it is a high-quality, honest example of the model that has been cared for with an open checkbook. Full service records are available to provide total confidence in your purchase.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a balanced synergy of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a clean history and a refined aesthetic. Our commitment to quality ensures this unit meets rigorous standards for mechanical integrity and roadworthiness. Experience the assurance of a well-preserved automobile that delivers both comfort and longevity.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This specimen offers a seamless driving experience, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and performance. A premier choice for the discerning driver seeking exceptional value without compromise.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for your next road trip? I’m selling my car, and it’s honestly been such a joy to drive. It’s in solid shape, runs like a dream, and has been really well-maintained over the years. It’s got plenty of life left in it and is just waiting for a new home. Feel free to reach out if you want to come see it in person—you’re going to love how it handles!

Available now is a mechanically sound E46 M3, featuring the iconic S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. This specimen benefits from a documented VANOS overhaul and rear subframe reinforcement, addressing key chassis weak points. Performance is sharpened by a Bilstein PSS10 coilover system and refreshed bushings, ensuring the variable M differential lock transfers power effectively through the corners. The high-revving powerband remains linear and responsive. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its age, the drivetrain remains robust and performance-ready.
Good condition. Clean interior. Reliable engine. No major issues. Ready to drive.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior maintains a deep, lustrous shine with only minor, expected road wear that doesn't detract from its impressive curb appeal. Inside, the cabin is clean and well-preserved; the upholstery is supple, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it has been meticulously maintained with a documented service history, offering a smooth, responsive drive and firm handling. It’s a turn-key car that has been cared for by a smoke-free owner and is ready for its next chapter. Reliable, stylish, and thoroughly inspected, this is a standout example for any discerning buyer.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which stands as a testament to diligent ownership and consistent care. Demonstrating robust mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, this automobile offers a superior driving experience for the discerning buyer. It represents an optimal balance of value and performance, ensuring reliable service and continued prestige on the road.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Presenting in commendable condition, the automobile has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. It remains a premier choice for the discerning driver who requires a reliable, high-caliber vehicle that has been treated with the utmost care by its previous owner.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s been truly loved? I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and it’s in wonderful shape! It’s been super dependable for me, runs smoothly, and is ready to hit the road with a new owner today. It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love it!

This E46 M3 remains a driver’s benchmark, powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six featuring six individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. The longitudinal chassis is paired with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock for optimal power delivery. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive valve adjustment and cooling system overhaul. While the exterior shows honest patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical vitals are robust, featuring reinforced rear subframe mounts and refreshed bushings. This unit offers a visceral, analog driving experience with precise turn-in response and a linear power band that pulls hard to the 8,000 RPM redline.
Used vehicle. Solid condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between pride of ownership and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the subtle signs of careful road use consistent with its age. Inside, the cabin remains a refined space; the seating surfaces are well-preserved and free of tears, while the dashboard and touchpoints show minimal wear. All electronic features, including the climate control and premium sound system, function flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and preventative maintenance. The engine pulls smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a quiet, composed ride. With tires and brakes in solid condition, this vehicle is completely turn-key and ready for its next chapter.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier selection for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and long-term value. Having undergone a rigorous professional inspection, this unit is prepared for immediate delivery, ensuring a seamless acquisition for its next owner.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies performance and reliability. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Offering a balanced synthesis of luxury and utility, this vehicle represents an exceptional acquisition for the discerning driver who values proven quality and sustained value.

Hey there! I’m selling my reliable ride, and I honestly think you’re going to love it! It’s in really solid shape and has been super dependable for me. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s ready for its next adventure with a new owner. It runs smoothly and looks great—perfect for someone looking for a quality car that's been well-loved! Come take it for a spin!

Available is a driver-focused E92 M3 featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This high-revving powerplant delivers linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox to the M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis benefits from Electronic Damper Control (EDC), ensuring optimal suspension kinematics during high-lateral-G maneuvers. Used car. Good condition. Regular maintenance performed. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear only.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the minor, superficial imperfections expected from careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free, featuring well-preserved upholstery and a full suite of electronics that function exactly as they should. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has been strictly serviced according to manufacturer intervals, resulting in a smooth, quiet, and responsive driving experience. With a detailed service history and recent preventative maintenance completed, this car is fully prepared for its next owner to drive away with total confidence. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer looking for a high-quality, dependable vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and sophisticated styling. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure consistent performance and operational reliability. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, it offers an exceptional balance of long-term value and driving excellence for the discerning professional. Available for immediate acquisition.
